body:
🛡️ Selective KeepInventory (Datapack for Minecraft 1.21.5)
Selective KeepInventory lets players keep only specific items when they die — no full inventory saves, no complete loss. It’s a perfect middle ground for survival, multiplayer, and adventure-style gameplay.

🔧 Features
✅ Keep only what you choose — tools, armor, or anything else

📁 Easy item tagging system

🧠 Smart handling of deaths & dimensions

🛠️ Fully customizable & multiplayer friendly

🚫 No mods or plugins needed

💡 How It Works
Players can tag items they want to keep using a simple in-game system. On death, only tagged items remain — the rest drop like normal. Lightweight, balanced, and fully compatible with Minecraft 1.21.5.
